title: Fox idol
description: Replace totem of undying with Fox idol
body:
This Resource Pack replacing totem of undying with **Fox idol**🦊. Inspired by totem of regeneration from _minecraft dungeons_

![Long forgotten idol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/591933565db7e115adfab9111175f25ee7bfc158.png)
# 
**Changes:**
- 🎵 Sound of totem usage
- ✨ Particles [They now look like enchantment symbols]
- 🎨 Totem texture
- ⚙️ Item name
# 

The **fox idol** is one of the first forms of the totem of undying, carved from wood it carries a long-lost ruby... ​​it is ready to save your life in a dangerous moment 🦊❤️
